name: Baby Ruth Cookies
recipeIngredient: 5 Baby ruth candy bars, cut into sixths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until soft.
2. Add powdered sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
4. Stir in flour. Wrap dough in waxed paper and chill at least 1 hour.
5. Roll dough out on a lightly floured board to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Using a 1 3/4 inch and 2-inch round cookie cutters, cut thirty rounds of each size.
7. Place smaller rounds on greased baking sheets, about 1 inch apart.
8. Top each with a slice of candy bar and a larger round of dough.
9. Press edges of dough together.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 12 minutes or until done.
